title: Harvest Record v1
description: The result of harvesting a crop cycle: weighed output, quality acceptance, and safety status, linked to the lease so the player's harvest entitlement can be computed. Field set to be cross-reviewed with Học's lease/harvest ERD (issue #6).

harvestId.description: Opaque public id of the harvest record.

cropCycleId.description: Opaque public id of the harvested crop cycle.

leaseId.description: Opaque public id of the lease this harvest is credited to (drives player entitlement).

harvestedAt.description: When the harvest was recorded (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC).

acceptedWeightKg.description: Portion accepted after quality check, in kilograms. Relationship acceptedWeightKg + rejectedWeightKg <= totalWeightKg is a business rule enforced at write time, not in this schema.

rejectedWeightKg.description: Portion rejected at quality check, in kilograms.

safetyStatus.description: Food-safety disposition of the harvest. 'held' means quarantined pending review; only 'accepted' produce may be released to the player.

evidenceIds.description: Opaque public ids of evidence records (weighing photos, quality notes) supporting this harvest.
